◎简　　介  

　　Having the somewhat dubious distinction of being ‘Britain’s first sex film’, Her Private Hell was made in response to the popularity of the risqué European titles which flooded British screens during the 60s. Warren went on to direct some highly successful low-budget horror films in the 1970s but his feature debut reflected an interest in art cinema rather than exploitation. In...
